'''Tailrings''', or '''sand dragons''', were desert creatures native to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. They dwelt in small flocks near oases. They had wings, black scales, and short patches of fur. They shed their skin annually, and their age could be determined by the number of knobs on their tail rattles. Sociable beings, they were popular pets among spacers, as they voraciously preyed upon [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]].

==Behind the scenes==
In "[[Dining at Dex's]]," an ingredient in the [[Socorro slider]] is called [[tailring bacon]] though, aside from the nominal connection, the work by [[Gregory Walker]] does not establish a [[canon]]ical connection to tailrings. The author has said that such references to the [[West End Games]] roleplaying game were intentional.<ref name="Blog-narbflick|11">{{Blog|narbflick|11|Dining at Dex's: The Story Behind the Story}}</ref>
